texts.description: Texts to embed (one embedding per text).
texts.title: Texts

files.description: Files containing texts to embed. Supports .txt (one text per line), .jsonl (one JSON string per line), or .json (array of strings).
files.title: Files

instruction.description: Task instruction for queries (e.g. 'Given a web search query, retrieve relevant passages that answer the query'). Only needed for query-side encoding, not for documents.
instruction.title: Instruction

prompt_name.description: Pre-configured prompt name (e.g. 'web_search_query', 'sts_query', 'bitext_query'). Alternative to providing a custom instruction.
prompt_name.title: Prompt Name

chunk_strategy.description: Chunking strategy. 'fixed': split by token count. 'recursive': split at paragraph/sentence/word boundaries within token budget. None: no chunking.
chunk_strategy.title: Chunk Strategy

chunk_size.description: Target chunk size in tokens. Clamped to model max (32768). Only used when chunk_strategy is set.
chunk_size.title: Chunk Size

chunk_overlap.description: Overlap between chunks in tokens. Only used when chunk_strategy is set.
chunk_overlap.title: Chunk Overlap
